parts.text: Build me a simple TODO API with FastAPI. I need endpoints to create, read, update, and delete todos. Each todo has a title, description, and completed status. Use SQLite for storage.

I need a user authentication service with FastAPI. Support registration with email/password, login that returns a JWT token, and a protected /me endpoint that returns the current user profile. Use SQLite and bcrypt for password hashing.

Create a blog API with posts and comments. Posts have a title, content, and author. Comments belong to a post and have content and author. I need CRUD for both posts and comments, plus an endpoint to get all comments for a post. Use FastAPI and SQLite.

Build an expense tracking API. Users can record expenses with amount, category, date, and notes. I need endpoints to add expenses, list expenses with optional date range filtering, get spending summary by category, and delete expenses. FastAPI + SQLite.

I want a bookmark manager API. Users can save bookmarks with URL, title, description, and tags. I need CRUD operations, search by tag, and an endpoint that checks if a URL is already bookmarked. FastAPI + SQLite.
